goal: Open Chrome and search for "Gemini Live Agent Challenge".

steps.description: Click on the Chrome address bar, which currently shows 'github.com/AdityaChauhanX07'.
steps.expected_result: The address bar content is selected or the cursor is placed in the address bar, ready for typing.

steps.description: Type 'Gemini Live Agent Challenge' into the address bar.
steps.expected_result: The address bar displays 'Gemini Live Agent Challenge'.
A Google search results page for 'Gemini Live Agent Challenge' is displayed in the active Chrome tab.

correction_history.reason: Initial attempt failed: No address bar is visible in the AFTER screenshot.
Tier-1 failed — tried alternative: No address bar is visible on the screen.

Tier-2 failed — required user assist: The address bar displays the URL 'https://www.google.com/search?q=Gemini+Live+Agent+Challenge&sourceid=chrome&ie=UTF-8'. The string 'Gemini Live Agent Challenge' is visible within this URL as part of the query parameter.
